title: Slow Computer and Full Storage
drDigitalIntro:
A slow computer often has too many apps open or full storage.
• Performance suffers when storage is over 90% full.
• Delete files you don't need and empty the trash.
• Close apps you're not using to free up memory.
• Let's fix a slow computer by cleaning up storage.

playgroundTask.goal: You freed up storage and your computer feels faster

steps.say: Click Storage in the sidebar to check how full your drive is.
The storage bar is almost full! Delete 'Old Videos' to free up 4 GB.
Now empty the Trash to actually reclaim the space.

drDigitalSuccess: You freed up storage! The bar dropped and your computer feels faster. Keep at least 10% of your storage free.
drDigitalHint: Click Storage in the sidebar, delete Old Videos, then empty the Trash.
